message: Ciclo 21:40 PDT Jun 23. MONITOREO COMPLETO. WMS confirma CSGU6625300→CLOSED (21:22 PDT). Outlook 2 fallos consecutivos⚠️. MATU2690410 IN_PROGRESS, KOCU4689466 EXCEPTION, CAIU9721329 NO-SHOW. Watchdog OK.
